title: cenchrus macrourus
intro: Cenchrus macrourus, also known as the sandbur grass, is a type of annual grass native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Cenchrus macrourus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
